patterns: Contactability is the highest-value loss driver at $973K across just 4 deals - average deal size $243K suggests enterprise targets going dark
Ursula has 42% connection rate but 41 losses with $0 won - converting meetings to pipeline stages failing despite volume
Zein holds 76 cold deals (67% of total 113 cold pipeline) indicating territory coverage issues or inadequate follow-up cadence
quick_wins: Ursula: Conduct win-loss analysis call with top 3 lost deals from $973K contactability bucket by Wednesday to identify stakeholder mapping gaps
Zein: Prioritize top 15 cold deals by revenue potential and execute re-engagement campaign with personalized Saudi Vision 2030 ROI messaging by Friday
risks: $973K lost to contactability across 4 deals signals weak stakeholder engagement or buying committee access - 20% of total losses from relationship gaps
113 cold deals (Zein 76, Jehad 22) represent stalled pipeline momentum with no stuck deal classification suggesting inadequate stage management and forecasting accuracy risk
